fields.label: Authentication Method
fields.description: api_token — long-lived API token from the Salto KS dashboard. oauth2 — client credentials flow (Client ID + Secret required).

fields.label: Site ID
fields.description: Salto KS site UUID. If provided, all API calls are scoped to /sites/{site_id}/. Leave blank if your API token already scopes to a single site.

fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Long-lived API token from the Salto KS developer dashboard. Stored encrypted. Never logged or returned to the browser.

fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: OAuth2 Client ID from the Salto KS developer portal.

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: OAuth2 Client Secret. Stored encrypted. Never logged or returned to the browser.

fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Salto KS API endpoint. Change only if using a region-specific or self-hosted endpoint.

fields.label: Key Type
fields.description: code = 4-8 digit PIN code (no hardware needed). mobile = key delivered to guest via Salto JustIN mobile app (requires guest email). card = RFID card programmed via a Salto online enrollment reader.

fields.label: Key Name Prefix
fields.description: Prepended to the guest name when naming keys in Salto KS.
